name: Aeb Transport & Courier Svc Co
recent_news: Listed on MO Rides as a Taxi/Rideshare NEMT provider in St. Joseph; St. Joseph SD school bus contract is held by First Student, not AEB.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator; classified as Taxi NPI / NEMT courier with ~10 employees. Not a fit for Summit tuck-in unless Summit wants NEMT/SPED van adjacency in NW Missouri.

name: Midwest Limousine Svc
recent_news: No school-district contract or M&A footprint identified; appears to be a small Florissant-area limo/livery operator. Multiple similarly-named limo LLCs in greater St. Louis make positive ID difficult.
fit_notes: Limousine/livery micro-operator; no evidence of yellow-bus school routes. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Quality Limousine Svc
recent_news: No public school-district contract, M&A, or ownership disclosure found; very small Valley Park (St. Louis suburb) livery operator.
fit_notes: Sub-scale limo/livery, classified as 'special_needs' likely via NEMT van work, not school-bus routes. Not a fit for Summit acquisition strategy.

name: Lele Services LLC
recent_news: Website leleservicesusa.com did not resolve (ECONNREFUSED) at time of review; no public news, school district contract, or Utah pupil-transport provider listing found. Likely a small NEMT/Medicaid transport vendor under ModivCare network.
fit_notes: No evidence of school-bus operation in Davis County / Utah. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Advantage Medical Transport
districts_or_customers: MO HealthNet/Medicaid NEMT via MTM brokerage (likely)
recent_news: Operating from 203 S Main St, Fayette MO; Yelp/business directory listings confirm Michelle Howell as owner; provides reliable NEMT and non-medical rides. No school-district or M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: NEMT operator (the name 'Medical Transport' is definitional). Not a yellow-bus contractor and not a Summit tuck-in fit.
